entities.name: WATERSHED PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs designed for the management and conservation of watersheds to drive agricultural growth and sustainable development

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in agricultural production and productivity within a region

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets current needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: RAIN-FED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural regions that rely solely on rainfall for water supply

entities.name: COLLECTIVE ACTION
entities.description: Coordinated efforts by a group to achieve common goals, specifically for conserving natural resources

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Materials or substances occurring in nature used for economic gain and sustainability

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area of land

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life and sustainable income

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INCOME DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating long-term, stable financial resources for households

entities.name: GENDER EQUITY
entities.description: Fairness of treatment for women and men according to their respective needs

entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Female human beings who act as managers and direct actors in watershed management

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING PROCESS
entities.description: The act of choosing between two or more courses of action in watershed management

entities.name: EDUCATIONAL LEVELS
entities.description: The amount of formal schooling attained by individuals, affecting their role in decision-making

entities.name: SOCIAL CUSTOMS
entities.description: Traditional practices and behaviors within a society that influence gender roles

entities.name: ECONOMIC DEPENDENCE
entities.description: The state of relying on another person or entity for financial support
